title: Factoring Service
description:
A service enabling corporate customers to convert accounts receivable into immediate funds at a discount.


Factoring is a financial service in which the business entity sells its bill receivables to a third party at a discount in order to raise funds. This is a type of business loan.
https://efinancemanagement.com/sources-of-finance/factoring

Factoring is a financial transaction and a type of debtor finance in which a business sells its accounts receivable (i.e., invoices) to a third party (called a factor) at a discount. (Wikipedia)
